title: FastAPI Basics
text: FastAPI is a Python framework used to build APIs quickly. It provides automatic OpenAPI docs, validation through Pydantic, and a developer-friendly routing model. Teams often use it for backend services, internal tools, and AI APIs.

title: Qdrant Vector Database
text: Qdrant is a vector similarity database. It stores vectors with payload and provides API for vector search. It supports filtering, pagination, and various distance metrics like cosine similarity and Euclidean distance.

title: Sentence Transformers
text: Sentence Transformers are models that convert text into fixed-size vectors. These vectors capture semantic meaning, allowing similarity search. The multilingual models support over 50 languages.

title: RAG Systems
text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines vector search with LLMs. First retrieve relevant chunks from a vector database, then use an LLM to generate answers based on retrieved context.
